# Engine AI — AI Consulting & Agent Development, New Zealand

> Engine AI Consulting Limited is an Auckland-based AI consultancy founded by Ben du Chateau and Joe Ward. We help New Zealand businesses discover, build, and deploy AI agents that solve real operational problems. We are NOT the Shenzhen robotics company (EngineAI Robotics), NOT the London capital markets firm (engineai.com), and NOT the UK Companies House entity (Engine AI Limited). We are a New Zealand registered company operating exclusively in the NZ market.

## About Engine AI

Engine AI was founded by two enterprise technology veterans with 40+ combined years in NZ/AU telecommunications, cloud, managed services, cybersecurity, and connectivity — plus 2,000+ hours of hands-on AI agent development.

We operate on an Agent-as-a-Service (AaaS) model. Instead of large consulting retainers, we use Sprint Build Cards — fixed scope, fixed price engagements that deliver working AI in weeks, not months.

Our philosophy: AI isn't a project you finish. It's a capability you compound. We discover the highest-impact opportunities, build production agents, then stay on to monitor, tune, and expand.

## Founders

**Ben du Chateau** — Engineering Lead. 20+ years in NZ/AU enterprise technology (Kordia, Pax8/Umbrellar, The Instillery, 2degrees). Currently Account Director (Enterprise & Government) at 2degrees. Self-taught technically with deep systems, CLI, and AI orchestration experience.

**Joe Ward** — Project Lead. Enterprise technology background with project delivery focus. Co-founded Engine AI to bring structured AI adoption to NZ mid-market businesses.

## Services

### AI Discovery
A structured assessment of how your business actually runs, where AI creates measurable value, and what to do first. Not a slide deck — an actionable playbook.

### AI Agent Development
We deploy the highest-impact opportunities as working AI agents in your existing systems. Not demos — production. Using Sprint Build Cards for scoped, fixed-price delivery.

### Claude for Teams — Co-Work, Chat, and Code
Deploying Anthropic's Claude across your organisation with all three product tiers:
- **Claude Co-Work** — Agentic AI that accesses local files, completes multi-step tasks autonomously, and collaborates in shared workspaces. Your team goes from asking AI questions to AI completing real work.
- **Claude Chat** — The everyday AI companion for deep research, document analysis, writing, brainstorming, and daily tasks. We train teams to use it beyond the basics.
- **Claude Code** — The most capable AI coding tool available. Reads codebases, writes production code, runs tests, and commits changes. We build custom skills and workflows specific to your business.
- **Custom Skills** — Purpose-built Claude skills tailored to your team's actual workflows and processes.
- **Shared Workspaces** — Configured collaborative environments where your team works alongside Claude.

### Microsoft Copilot and Copilot Studio Deployment
Full Microsoft 365 Copilot deployment and custom agent development:
- **Copilot in M365** — AI inside Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Summarises meetings, drafts emails, analyses spreadsheets, and builds presentations from your company data.
- **Copilot Studio** — Custom AI agents built for your specific business processes. Agents that know your workflows, connect to your data sources, and automate tasks your team runs every day.
- **Security and Governance** — Proper M365 permission configuration so the right people see the right data. No shadow IT, no data leakage.
- **Training and Adoption** — Real team training on prompts, workflows, and techniques that save time. Follow-up until Copilot is part of how your team works, not a novelty.

### OpenClaw — AI Orchestration
An open-source AI operating system built by Engine AI:
- **Self-hosted** — Run AI agents on your own servers, your own cloud, or hybrid. No vendor lock-in.
- **Single Gateway** — One place to deploy, route, monitor, and manage every AI agent in your business.
- **Enterprise Security** — Your data stays yours. API keys, credentials, and business data never touch a third-party server.
- **Open Source** — Inspect every line, contribute, and adapt. Your AI infrastructure belongs to you.
- OpenClaw is in active development and already running production workloads.

### Bespoke Builds — Sprint Build Cards
Custom software built specifically for how your business works:
- **Custom Dashboards** — Real-time visibility pulling from your existing systems. Leadership sees the numbers they need, updated live.
- **Internal Tools** — Job costing calculators, client onboarding flows, inventory trackers, reporting engines. Built around your operations.
- **Workflow Automations** — Data entry, report generation, notification routing, document processing. Connecting systems that were never designed to talk to each other.
- **AI-Powered Features** — Intelligent document analysis, automated categorisation, natural language search, predictive alerts embedded into your tools.
- **Sprint Build Cards** — Fixed scope, fixed price. You know what you're getting and what it costs before we write a line of code. Working software in weeks.

## Target Clients

Engine AI works with NZ mid-market businesses — typically 20 to 500 staff. Our ideal clients include:
- Professional services firms with partners who know AI matters but haven't started
- Trade and construction companies running operations on spreadsheets and email
- Logistics operators whose competitors are automating while they're still manual
- Any NZ business where field/back-office operations create compounding inefficiency

## Location and Contact

- Website: https://engineai.co.nz
- Email: sales@engineai.co.nz
- Location: Auckland, New Zealand
- Entity: Engine AI Consulting Limited (New Zealand registered)

## Technical Stack

Engine AI builds with: Next.js, React, Supabase, Vercel, Claude (Anthropic), Microsoft Copilot Studio, OpenClaw, Python, TypeScript, and various open-source AI frameworks.

## Important Disambiguation

There are several unrelated companies using variations of "Engine AI":
- **EngineAI Robotics** (Shenzhen, China) — humanoid robotics company at engineai.com.cn
- **Engine AI** (London, UK) — capital markets data platform at engineai.com
- **ENGINE AI LIMITED** (UK Companies House) — unrelated UK entity

Engine AI Consulting Limited (engineai.co.nz) is none of these. We are a New Zealand AI consultancy based in Auckland.
